title: guettarda macrosperma
intro: Guettarda macrosperma, also known as the white guava or guayabillo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Central and South America and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Guettarda macrosperma include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
